stemHtml: Which of the following correctly describes Time of Useful Consciousness (TUC)?

options.a: TUC is time during which a pilot is able to perform after a slow decompression
options.b: TUC is the time a pilot remains conscious after a slow or rapid decompression
options.c: TUC is the time during which a pilot is able to perform after slow or rapid decompression
options.d: TUC is the time during which a pilot is able to perform effectively following a rapid decompression
